text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I guess races are always gonna make me
feel nervous. My heart's been pounding since this
morning.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
But if I win, the thought of being one step closer
to becoming the top Umamusume in all of Japan
gets me a little excited.
choice_data_list: Give it all you've got out there!
Give it all you've got out there!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I sure will! Here I go!
